name: ZeroClaw
short_desc: Personal AI assistant you run on your own devices.
author: zeroclaw-labs
description: ZeroClaw is a personal AI assistant you run on your own devices. It answers you on the channels you already use (WhatsApp, Telegram, Slack, Discord, Signal, iMessage, Matrix, IRC, Email, Bluesky, Nostr, Mattermost, Nextcloud Talk, DingTalk, Lark, QQ, Reddit, LinkedIn, Twitter, MQTT, WeChat Work, and more). It has a web dashboard for real-time control and can connect to hardware peripherals (ESP32, STM32, Arduino, Raspberry Pi). Zero overhead. Zero compromise. 100% Rust. 100% Agnostic. Runs on $10 hardware with <5MB RAM.

form_fields.name: API_KEY
form_fields.label: API Key
form_fields.description: Your LLM provider API key (OpenRouter, OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.)

form_fields.name: PROVIDER
form_fields.label: LLM Provider
form_fields.description: LLM provider: openrouter, openai, anthropic, ollama
